overall.description: A first-person exploration of Hogwarts castle corridors leading to the Slytherin Common Room. The player walks through gothic stone hallways with vaulted ceilings, passing suits of armor and chandeliers, encounters other students, and enters the dimly lit common room with its distinctive serpent fountain and tapestry-lined passages.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit gothic castle corridor with vaulted stone ceilings. The camera moves forward past a suit of armor and under iron chandeliers, approaching a pair of large torch pillars that illuminate the archway ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a series of connected corridors, passing a carved wooden door and ascending a stone staircase. The environment maintains the gothic architecture with stone archways and warm artificial lighting from hanging lanterns.

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a grand staircase flanked by burning torch braziers, passing students on the landing. A large painting hangs on the wall before the carved wooden door of the Slytherin Common Room, which is identified by on-screen text.

segments.scene_description: Entering the Slytherin Common Room, the camera reveals a central fountain with serpent statues, stone benches, and potted plants. The scene transitions into a narrow, dimly lit corridor lined with tapestries depicting dragons and serpents, with a suit of armor standing guard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through the gothic corridors of a castle, transitioning from the public stone hallways into the secluded depths of the Slytherin Common Room. It begins in a dimly lit corridor with vaulted ceilings, moving past suits of armor and iron chandeliers toward torch-lit archways. As the camera ascends a stone staircase and navigates connected hallways, the environment remains steeped in gothic architecture and warm lantern light, eventually passing students in dark robes on an upper floor. The scene then shifts as the camera descends a grand staircase flanked by burning braziers, passing a large wall painting before arriving at a carved wooden door. Finally, the camera enters the common room to reveal a central serpent fountain and stone benches before gliding into a narrow, dimly lit passage lined with dragon and serpent tapestries.
